meta.title: SE Resource Hub
meta.description: Unified catalog for Discrete Manufacturing SEs — agents, solutions, tools, resources, and onboarding.

featured.title: RAPP Pipeline — Transcript to Agent
featured.description: Drop a discovery transcript and get a deployable Azure Function agent + demo + HTML tester in one step.

featured.title: Mfg CoE Command Center
featured.description: The SE operations hub — backlog, outcomes, sprint board, activity feed, and AI chat in one M365-style shell.

featured.title: AI Studio for Dynamics 365
featured.description: Mauricio Oliveira's tool suite — connect your D365 org and get instant AI-powered utilities. Runs in the Resource Hub side panel.

featured.title: MCAPS IQ
featured.description: SE intelligence platform — account insights, SWOT, executive briefings, and strategic positioning for Manufacturing customers.

agents.title: RAPP Pipeline Agent
agents.description: Full 14-step agent production pipeline. Actions: transcript_to_agent, auto_process, generate_report, quality gates QG1-QG6.

agents.title: CoE PM Agent
agents.description: Backlog management, sprint planning, prioritization, and weekly digest for the Mfg CoE.

agents.title: CoE SME Agent
agents.description: Generates SOPs, documents standard business processes, and defines agentic use cases for Discrete Manufacturing.

agents.title: CoE Developer Agent
agents.description: Scaffolds Azure Function agents, generates D365 configurations, creates RAPP artifacts, and performs code review.

agents.title: CoE Architect Agent
agents.description: Designs Microsoft stack solutions, evaluates patterns, creates architecture docs, and recommends optimal tech.

agents.title: D365 Demo Prep Agent
agents.description: Provisions demo data, validates D365 org state, runs numbered PS scripts (1-25) for full demo environment setup.

agents.title: Scripted Demo Agent
agents.description: Drives interactive demos with pre-built walkthroughs. Supports multiple customer personas and demo scenarios.

solutions.title: CxAI Data Generation & Agent Enablement
solutions.description: Instantly create customer-contextual D365 Sales + Customer Service environments and auto-configure AI agents in minutes, not days. Generates realistic data tailored to a specific customer (e.g. Walmart, Sandvik). Built by Poonam Thawani + Eric Boocock. Contact them for access + onboarding guide.
solutions.author: Poonam Thawani & Eric Boocock
solutions.access_note: Internal Microsoft — contact Poonam Thawani or Eric Boocock for onboarding guide and solution download

solutions.title: Email Management Solution (Draft)
solutions.description: D365 Customer Service email automation — intelligent triage, auto-routing, and AI-draft replies. Supports embedded CS and standalone deployment.

solutions.title: Multi-Agent Copilot Solution
solutions.description: Power Platform managed solution: Copilot Studio bot + Power Automate flows + Azure Function backend. One-click import to your D365 org.

tools.title: Power Agents Blueprint
tools.description: Copilot CLI plugin (by Erol Atac) that turns a Power Platform solution ZIP or Copilot Studio agent into a self-contained interactive HTML architecture dashboard — ERD, flow timelines, component inventory, risk notes. Install: copilot plugin install promptclickrun/power-agents-blueprint.

tools.title: CoE Spin-Up Wizard
tools.description: scripts/spin-up-se-coe.ps1 — 10-question PowerShell wizard. Copies mfg_coe template, tokenizes branding/colors, resets inbox, writes COE_INFO.json. Run pwsh scripts/spin-up-se-coe.ps1.

resources.title: RAPP in a Box — Adoption Guide
resources.description: 3-tier adoption path (Consume / Local / Codespaces) for any Americas SE who wants to fork this pattern. Covers install, governance, anti-patterns, starter pack.

resources.description: Zero-install, browser-only path. For SEs who don't want to fight Python venvs. 5-minute walkthrough to your first architecture dashboard.

resources.title: SE Command Center in a Box
resources.description: Turnkey CoE — branded portal + resource hub + demo hub + Soul inbox + agent team. 10-min onboarding wizard. The 'experience' half of RAPP (the 'engine' half).
